title: Add user authentication flow
description: Implement login/logout functionality with JWT-based session management
design:
## Authentication Design

Token-based auth using JWT with HTTP-only cookies.

### Flow
1. User submits credentials
2. Server validates and issues JWT
3. Token stored in HTTP-only cookie
4. Subsequent requests include cookie automatically
notes:
## Technical Notes

- Use bcrypt for password hashing
- JWT expiry: 15 minutes access, 7 days refresh
- Store refresh tokens in database for revocation
acceptance_criteria:
Given a user with valid credentials
When they submit the login form
Then they receive a JWT token and are redirected to the dashboard

Given a user with an expired token
When they make an API request
Then the token is automatically refreshed if the refresh token is valid

Given a logged-in user
When they click logout
Then their session is invalidated and they are redirected to the login page
